headline: Are Options Traders Betting on a Big Move in Amgen Stock?
summary: Investors need to pay close attention to AMGN stock based on the movements in the options market lately.

headline: Piper Sandler Maintains Overweight on Amgen, Lowers Price Target to $427
summary: Piper Sandler  analyst David Amsellem   maintains Amgen (NASDAQ:AMGN) with a Overweight and lowers the price target from $432 to $427.
